name: George M. Cohan
abstract: George Michael Cohan (July 3, 1878 – November 5, 1942) was an American entertainer, playwright, composer, lyricist, actor, singer, dancer and theatrical producer. Cohan began his career as a child, performing with his parents and sister in a vaudeville act known as "The Four Cohans".

about_quotes.evidence: George M. Cohan was coming there, I mean, really. ... George M. Cohan was a dancer. He was a dancer, and he was very famous. He had theatres.
